title: Ceterach aureum
taxonomy: Ceterach aureum is classified as a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It belongs to the genus Ceterach, which is a small group of ferns commonly known as the 'wall ferns'. Within the Polypodiaceae family, Ceterach aureum is part of the large group of ferns known as the 'polypody ferns'. This classification is based on the plant's physical characteristics and its evolutionary relationships with other ferns. Further studies may provide more insights into the classification of Ceterach aureum within the broader context of ferns.
